title: Veil Origins
description: The Best Alternative to the most popular origins mod. built from scratch for the community. ❤️
body:
# 🌙 Veil Origins **A comprehensive, standalone origin system for Minecraft 1.21.1 and 1.21.11 (1.21.8 is no longer supported)** *Transform your Minecraft experience with unique character origins, abilities, and passives.*

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER ⚠️ **This mod is a completely SEPARATE and INDEPENDENT project.** It is **NOT** an official port, fork, or affiliate of the original **Origins** mod by **Apace100**. Veil Origins is built from the ground up with its own codebase, unique abilities, and custom systems for NeoForge. *Please do not report issues from this mod to the original Origins developers.*

## ✨ Features Veil Origins is a massive expansion to the origins genre, introducing **21 unique playable origins**, each with custom abilities, visual effects, and playstyles. * ✅ **21 Unique Origins** - Ranging from the blood-thirsty Vampire to the reality-bending Riftwalker. * ✅ **Active Ability System** - Use **[R]** and **[V]** to trigger powerful active skills. * ✅ **Custom HUD & UI** - Beautiful animated HUD with a built-in **Config Screen (Press 'H')**. * ✅ **Vampire Blood System** - Complete overhaul of hunger for Vampires with blood bars and bottles. * ✅ **Radial Menu** - Intuitive ability selection. * ✅ **Multiplayer Ready** - Fully synchronized for servers.

## 🎭 Available Origins ### 💀 High Impact *Drastic gameplay changes.* | Origin | Description | Key Abilities | | :---: | :---: | :---: | | **Vampire** | The ultimate night predator. Replaces hunger with a Blood System. | Blood Drain, Bat Form, Vampiric Leap | | **Werewolf** | Ruler of the moon. Buffed at night, eats raw meat. | Wolf Form, Howl | | **Necromancer** | **(NEW)** Master of the undead. | Raise Dead, Life Siphon | | **Veilborn** | Walk between life and death. | Veil Step, Soul Harvest | | **Riftwalker** | Dimensional traveler who bends space. | Dimensional Hop, Pocket Dimension | | **Umbrakin** | Native to the shadows. | Shadow Meld, Darkness Bolt | | **Voidtouched** | Corrupted by the void. | Void Tear, Reality Shift | | **Ethereal** | Ghostly being phased between dimensions. | Phase Shift, Possession |
### 🌿 Medium Impact *Strong themes with balanced trade-offs.* | Origin | Description | Key Abilities | | :---: | :---: | :---: | | **Dryad** | **(NEW)** Guardian of the forest. | Entangling Roots, Photosynthesis | | **Frostborn** | Master of ice and cold. | Ice Spike, Blizzard | | **Cindersoul** | Born from volcanic fury. | Flame Burst, Lava Walk | | **Tidecaller** | Commander of the ocean. | Tidal Wave, Aqua Bubble | | **Starborne** | Celestial being powered by light. | Celestial Dash, Starlight Beacon | | **Skyborn** | Master of winds and flight. | Wind Blast, Updraft | | **Mycomorph** | Part mushroom, part humanoid. | Spore Cloud, Fungal Network | | **Technomancer** | Cybernetic redstone master. | Redstone Pulse, Overclock | | **Vampling** | Lesser vampire, day-walker. | Life Steal |
### 🛡️ Low Impact *Vanilla-plus enhancements.* | Origin | Description | Key Abilities | | :---: | :---: | :---: | | **Stoneheart** | Living stone tank. | Seismic Slam, Stone Skin | | **Feralkin** | Beast shapeshifter instincts. | Primal Roar, Beast Form | | **Crystalline** | Resonant living crystal. | Crystal Spike, Ore Resonance | | **Wolfling** | Lesser werewolf. | Pack Howl |

## 🛠️ New in v1.0.4 ### 🩸 Vampire Blood Overhaul * **New Blood Bar**: Replacing the hunger bar entirely for Vampires. * **Bottles**: Craft and fill **Blood Bottles** to store sustenance. * **Mechanics**: Drain enemies to refuel. Running empty causes starvation! ### ⚙️ HUD Configuration & Font Engine * **Press 'H'** to open the new **HUD Editor**. * Customize position, visibility, and opacity of all HUD elements. * New **Unicode Font Handler** for crisp, beautiful text.

## 💻 Commands & Controls | Input | Action | | :---: | :---: | | **`R`** | Primary Ability | | **`V`** | Secondary Ability | | **`O`** | View Origin Info | | **`H`** | Open HUD Configuration | | `/veilorigins list` | (Admin) List origins | | `/veilorigins set` | (Admin) set player origin |

---
Made with ❤️ by Insanity Studios
